calendar.matters:
UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff The Bank of New York Mellon is present. Represented by Jessica Reyes.
Attorney David Marcolini appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Joseph W. Melton is present.
Attorney Hope Greenhill representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
Per Plaintiff's request, the trial date of MAR-19-2012 remains on calendar.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Continued To Mar-19-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Continued To Mar-15-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Bank of New York Mellon fka The Bank of New York as Trustee for the certificateholders CWALT, Inc. is present. No representative present.
Attorney David Marcolini, specially appearing for Pite, Duncan, attorney for the plaintiff.
Defendant Joseph W. Melton is present.
Attorney Hope Greenhill representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsel stipulate to a continuance. Defendant is ill. The court grants the continuance before the settlement conference.

The Settlement conference of 2-16-2012 is continued to 3-15-2012 @ 1:30PM in Dept. 501.

The Jury Trial is continued from 2-21-2012 to 3-19-2012 @ 9:00AM in Dept. 501.
